reason: The deterministic selector failed before publishing candidates because the complete pre-locked proposal union did not satisfy the gateway stratum. A later metadata-only addition would change the proposal bytes after the v1.7 reset had already bound them, so it cannot be used in v1.7.

disposition.next_cycle: A fresh reset must include the complete amended metadata proposals before deterministic selection.

public_claim_boundary: This record makes no source, calibration, detector, precision, recall, or release-performance claim.
